summary: Independent L3 plan review found no remaining P0-P2 defects. The plan keeps all inquiry work inside the nursery plugin boundary, uses five versioned plugin-owned tables with recoverable forward migration and no foreign keys, binds user access to authenticated ownership, separates six administrator permissions, audits full-phone reveal before disclosure, preserves immutable snapshots and append-only reply and state history, and implements the approved state machine, 600-second HMAC duplicate guard, and independently committed 60-second rate limit. Public reference prices and favorites remain independent, while PHP, MySQL, HTTP, role, concurrency, browser, and rollback verification remain explicit L4 release gates rather than claimed local passes.
